Implemented `50aad11f` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_50aad11f/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_50aad11f/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_50aad11f/generator.py).

Rule summary: find each connected `6`-shape, recolor it with the nearest singleton non-`6` marker, crop each recolored shape to its tight 4x4 box, then concatenate the crops left-to-right if the shape set is wider than tall, otherwise top-to-bottom. I used the summary hint because it matched all official examples; no `notes.md` was needed, and no new DSL primitive was necessary. The generator stays close to the task family by constructing 2-3 connected 4x4 magenta shapes, placing markers below horizontal layouts or to the right of vertical layouts, and emitting the packed recolored crops directly.
